'''''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 13''' is the thirteenth issue of [[Star Wars Insider|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'']], later rebranded as the ''Star Wars Insider''. Issue 13 was published in Fall [[1990]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
===Features===
*"Vic Armstrong: The 'Other' Indy Behind the Bullwhip" by [[Pamela Roller]]
*"''Raiders'' to [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|Jedi]]'': On Location with Howard Kazanjian" by [[Lisa E. Cowan]]
*"Indiana Jones Adventure Outpost" by [[Adam Schultz]]
*"EXCLUSIVE UPDATE: ''The Young Indiana Jones Chronicles''"
*"Inside [[Industrial Light & Magic|ILM]]: ''Ghost''" by [[John S. Davis]]
*"Story Time" cartoons by Lisa E. Cowan and [[R. Tomasic]]
